title: Totally Optimized FPS
description: A no-bloat modpack made simply for better FPS and smoother gameplay
body:
What is Totally Optimized?

Totally Optimized is a lightweight Fabric/Neoforge performance modpack designed for one purpose — maximum FPS and smooth gameplay on any system.
No bloat, no unnecessary mods — just pure optimization.
Has about half the mods compared to bigger modpacks while performing the same or better.
Whether you’re running Minecraft on a low-end laptop or a high-end rig, this pack squeezes every bit of performance from your setup.

**Fabric versions have the benefit of supporting Voxy, a LOD mod that greatly increases render distance with essentially no performance drop.** Voxy is much more effective that Distant Horizons, while compatible with (Neo)Forge, I have decided not to include due to a rather large performance drop on lower end systems.
⸻

Key Features
	•	Massive FPS boost compared to vanilla
	•	Smoother world loading and faster chunk generation
	•	Lightweight — installs fast, starts fast, runs fast
	•	Perfect for vanilla+, SMP, or performance-focused players

Available on curseforge too: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/totally-optimized-fps
